title: cinnamomum calciphilum
intro: Cinnamomum calciphilum, also known as the calciphilous cinnamon tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cinnamomum calciphilum include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Cinnamomum calciphilum plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, or dried and used as a spice to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
